name: Katawa Shoujo - Miki Miura
description:
Miki Miura is secondary character in Katawa Shoujo, there is very few information about her in game, she is tomboy, wears male shirt instead of blouse, her left palm is missing and bandaged, dislikes math, second fastest student in Yamaku.

For now she knows only about Emi, Lilly and Hanako, I will add other characters later.

tags: tomboy, girl, disabled, disability, amputee, runner, run, sport
